hooks.prompt: Context compression is about to occur. Check if .claude/wiki/ exists in the current project directory. If this session had any significant work (decisions made, features built, problems solved, architecture discussed), invoke the wiki-archivist agent to save a pre-compact session entry to .claude/wiki/. Use 'pre-compact' as the log entry type. If only trivial things happened (brief questions, no meaningful decisions or code changes), skip the wiki update.

This session is ending. Check if .claude/wiki/ exists in the current project directory. If this session had significant work (features built, decisions made, problems solved, architecture discussed), invoke the wiki-archivist agent to save a session-end entry to .claude/wiki/. Use 'session-end' as the log entry type. If the session was brief or trivial (only minor clarifications, no meaningful work), skip the wiki update. After completing or skipping, approve the stop.
